brand.localFirstDescription: Data, reports, rules, and memories stay on this machine by default.

agentChat.title: Agent Chat
agentChat.subtitle: Business Operations Workspace
agentChat.description: Ask the local business agent to analyze uploaded files, business rules, local memories, and report history.
agentChat.consoleDescription: Analyze synced data, business rules, local memories, reports, and selected project files without moving customer data to GyuTron cloud.
agentChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask the local agent, use @file references, or request an engineering patch...

quick.createDailyAutomation: Create a daily owner report automation
quick.generateLatestSyncedReport: Generate report from latest synced data

agentChat.ownerReportIntro: I can now call your configured model and, in engineering mode, use selected project files as local context before proposing changes.
agentChat.configureModelFirst: Configure a model first, then send a message.
agentChat.agentThinking: Agent is thinking, checking context, and preparing a structured response...
agentChat.applyPatchConfirm: Apply this patch to local files? A rollback record will be saved.
agentChat.patchAppliedContent: {{count}} file change(s) were written locally and recorded for rollback.

dashboard.title: Ecommerce Dashboard
dashboard.description: Cross-platform view for revenue, orders, inquiries, conversion, margin, ads, and follow-up status.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: Manage local-first data connectors. Platform connectors are placeholders until real API integrations are intentionally added.
dataSources.createLocalFolderDescription: Use a watched local folder for Alibaba, ERP, Shopee, Amazon, or Shopify exports.
dataSources.configuredConnectorsDescription: Sync jobs and imported file records are stored in the local SQLite database.
dataSources.name: Name
dataSources.noConnectorsDescription: Create a Local Folder connector to import the first Excel or CSV export.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Manage owner daily reports, scheduled reports, and Agent-generated analyses.
reports.noReportsDescription: Generate the first owner daily report from local connector data.
reports.demoSummary: Brazil and Indonesia contributed the strongest inquiry momentum. Follow-up latency and IC-420 inventory are the main risks today.
reports.demoFindingRevenue: Total revenue reached $128.4K, up 12.8% from the previous comparable period.
reports.demoFindingFollowup: 6 Brazil inquiries should be handled before end of day.
reports.demoFindingInventory: Industrial Camera IC-420 is both a growth product and a stock risk.
reports.demoSuggestion: Prioritize high-value Brazil customers, confirm inventory replenishment, and generate a dedicated weekly margin review.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Track Agent tasks, report generation jobs, tool calls, results, errors, and audit trails.
tasks.mocked: Mocked until AgentTask API is connected

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Review local business memory used by reports and agent reasoning.

businessRules.title: Business Rules
businessRules.description: Maintain natural-language business rules that affect prioritization and report generation.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Show local audit records for logins, model settings, connector syncs, automations, backups, demo data, patch apply, and rollback.
auditLogs.auditTrailDescription: Every medium or high-risk local action is written here for review.
auditLogs.noLogsDescription: Logins, connector syncs, reports, backups, and policy changes will appear here automatically.

modelSettings.title: Model Settings
modelSettings.description: Configure customer-owned model credentials. API keys are stored locally, masked in the UI, and never printed by the app.
modelSettings.localModelHint: Use Ollama or LM Studio for fully local inference.
modelSettings.keyStoredLocally: Model API keys are stored locally.
modelSettings.providerBehaviorDescription: Use Ollama or LM Studio for fully local inference. External API providers should follow your security policy.
modelSettings.securityDescription: Local save, masked return, no key logging
